line_weight: n/a at M0 (placeholder art: flat colored rects, 1px darker outline)

item_icon.template: pixel art, game item icon, {subject}, centered single object, flat colors, clean silhouette, dark plain background
item_icon.negative: photo, realistic, 3d render, blurry, soft focus, text, watermark, frame, border, gradient background, multiple objects

bgm_town.template: instrumental, fantasy village theme, warm, gentle, calming, acoustic guitar, flute, soft strings, {bpm} bpm, consistent tempo, seamless loop, game music

bgm_dungeon.template: instrumental, dark dungeon ambience, quiet dread, low strings, sparse percussion, distant rumble, slow, {bpm} bpm, consistent tempo, seamless loop, game music

bgm_battle.template: instrumental, fast battle theme, driving percussion, urgent strings, brass hits, energetic, {bpm} bpm, consistent tempo, seamless loop, game music
